title: Alcantara Brings the Heat, Gives Chicago a Ride on the L Train at Wrigley Field
body:
As the 2026 baseball season rapidly approaches, fantasy enthusiasts are eagerly anticipating a breakout performance from Miami Marlins ace Sandy Alcantara. The hard-throwing right-hander has been making waves in the baseball world with his impressive velocity and a penchant for dominating on the mound. With a strong spring training performance under his belt, Alcantara is poised to make a significant impact in fantasy baseball leagues this season.

Alcantara's impressive stats from the 2025 season have many experts predicting a breakout year for the 27-year-old pitcher. With a career-high 3.20 ERA and 12 wins, Alcantara cemented his status as one of the top pitchers in the National League. His impressive velocity and pinpoint control make him an attractive pick for fantasy owners looking to bolster their pitching staffs. As a result, Alcantara has been rising up the ranks in many fantasy baseball rankings, with some experts projecting him to be a top-five starter in the NL East.

One of the key factors contributing to Alcantara's success is his ability to pitch deep into games. In 2025, Alcantara led the league in innings pitched, often going the distance in starts against top-notch lineups. This ability to carry a heavy workload has made him a valuable asset to the Marlins, and it's likely to translate to the fantasy baseball world as well. Fantasy owners will be looking for pitchers who can provide a high number of quality starts, and Alcantara is poised to deliver.

While Alcantara is certainly one of the top pitchers in the league, there are a few other players who are also worth keeping an eye on. One such player is Cam Schlittler, a prospect who has been making waves in the minor leagues with his impressive bat speed and power. Schlittler is expected to make his major league debut this season, and his speed and power make him an attractive pick for fantasy owners looking to bolster their lineup. Another player worth watching is veteran left-hander Chris Sale, who is recovering from an injury that kept him sidelined for much of last season. Sale is expected to be fully healthy this season, and his impressive career stats make him a solid pick for fantasy owners looking to bolster their pitching staffs.

As the 2026 season gets underway, fantasy owners will be looking for players who can deliver on their expectations. Sandy Alcantara is certainly one of the top pitchers to watch, and his impressive stats and ability to pitch deep into games make him an attractive pick for fantasy owners. With a strong spring training performance under his belt, Alcantara is poised to make a significant impact in fantasy baseball leagues this season. As the season gets underway, fantasy owners will be keeping a close eye on Alcantara's performance, and it's likely that he'll be a top-five starter in the NL East.

As the fantasy baseball world continues to buzz with excitement over Alcantara's potential, one thing is clear: the 2026 season is shaping up to be an exciting one for fantasy owners. With a talented crop of young players and a number of veteran pitchers looking to bounce back from injury, there's no shortage of options for fantasy owners looking to build a winning team. Whether you're a seasoned veteran or a newcomer to the world of fantasy baseball, the 2026 season is sure to be a wild ride.
